utterances.text: Sarah, Miguel, thanks for the time. I saw your usage report and wanted to talk about expansion before we get into quarterly review.
Yes, we're ready. The original twenty-eight reps are fully ramped, and we want to add another twelve seats for our APAC team in May.
We also want to enable the AI Workflow add-on for the existing reps. We held off in the initial deal but the feedback from peer companies has been very positive.
Both are great signals. Twelve more seats plus AI enablement across the full thirty seats brings you to forty seats with AI.
Right. We also need to discuss one issue that came up last week — sequences scheduled at nine in the morning Central European time were actually firing at ten after the daylight saving change.
Yes, Miguel actually opened a ticket on that one. The fix is rolled out and we re-ran the affected schedules. Let me confirm everything looks correct now.
Looking at this morning, the EMEA sequences fired at nine on the dot. Looks good.
Excellent. Back to expansion. For the AI Workflow add-on on the original thirty seats, we can apply your enterprise discount and prorate to the existing renewal date.
Prorate works for us. Can you also include a small bench of seats for new hire flex over the next twelve months?
We can include five flex seats at zero cost for twelve months, then convert to paid if usage continues. Standard for accounts at this tier.
One more thing. APAC team is mostly in Singapore and Sydney. Anything we need to be aware of for those regions?
Both are well supported. Data residency stays in your current region unless you ask otherwise. Time zones and language settings are per-user.
Perfect. Send the order form by end of week and we can get this signed before the APAC start date.
Will do. Thanks both, talk soon.
